notes: Pilot: Buster on odds 1..15; one bunny on page 13 only (Character_Bunnies). Text rank of basenames + description.

labels.description: Small black-and-white companion dog; short smooth coat with clear black-and-white patches; floppy ears; bright dark eyes; compact build; expressive face.
labels.visual_lock: Always a small black-and-white short-coated dog with floppy ears and bright dark eyes. No breed drift, no solid-color coat, no loss of black-and-white pattern.

labels.description: Small live rabbits; soft fur in natural browns and grays with white accents; upright alert ears; compact bodies.
labels.visual_lock: Always ordinary small rabbits with soft natural fur and upright ears; no cartoon mash-up species, no costume.
labels.note: One bunny on page 13 only (not p1/p2/p3).
